description:
This is a sturdy and fantastic humane mouse or critter trap. You set the trap from the outside of the cage. Then drop some sunflower seeds through the top of the cage without having to put your hands inside no matter when used indoor or outdoor, or bait it with snacks attractant to trap voles, squirrels, chipmunks, mice, rats, weasels and other similar size animals. Additional latch followed by gravity once triggering completely prevents captive animals from escaping from the door. It is also easy to set the target caught animal free just by re-setting the trap. All sets in seconds.

Feature：

* HIGH SENSITIVITY GRAVITY PEDAL: Door will be auto-locked immediately when small rodent animal step into cage trap and touched the pedal slightly.

 

* NOT EASY TO ESCAPE DESIGN: Light weight iron material structure, small mesh openings and door locked tightly ensure the trapped rodent animals no way to escape easily，constructed of sturdy galvanized steel for maximum resistance to rust and corrosion, If you want to catch a big one, please choose a bigger size.

 

* SAFETY & NON-TOXIC: Can be used with any sweet-smelling and tasty baits, safe for people and pets, effective reduce mouse population around your house, farm, back yard, restaurant, hotel, office, garage and so on.

 

* HUMANE ANIMAL TRAP: To solve your small rodents, mouse, rats, voles, chipmunks harassed problem. It does not kill or injure captured animal, release any animals caught unintentionally.

 

* EASY TO USE: Sets up in seconds, can be used indoors or outdoors. Constructed of sturdy galvanized steel, lightweight but durable to last longer without rust and corrosion issue.

Specification：

Material: galvanized iron

U Shaped Length: 21.8cm/8.58in

Size: 27.3x13.8x11.2cm/10.75x5.43x4.41in

Weight: 350g/0.77lbs

Package Size: 30*16*13cm/11.81*6.3*5.11in

Package Weight: 449g/0.99 lbs

PackageContents：

  • 1 x One-door Mouse Cage Trap
  • 1 x User Manual

Friendly Reminder:

1. Iron rust on the surface of the product is very common, and it does not affect your normal use.

2. Please carefully refer to product pictures and videos for how to use the trap.

3. Handle with absolute care and avoid pinching fingers.

4. Keep the trap out of reach of children and pets.

5. Never touch the trap with your hands once it has been set as you might injure yourself.
